Class AccuracyListBuilder

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Builds a sorted list of valid unit accuracy values for Revit Autodesk.Revit.DB.FormatOptions based on the specified unit.

public static class AccuracyListBuilder
Inheritance
object
AccuracyListBuilder
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Candidate accuracies are generated from:

  • Decimal candidates: 1/2/5 scaled by powers of 10 from 10^-3 through 10^3.
  • Fractional length candidates: 1/2, 1/4, ... 1/64 inches (or converted to feet for feet-fractional inches).

The final list is rounded to three decimals, de-duplicated, validated against Revit's Autodesk.Revit.DB.FormatOptions accuracy constraints for the given unit, and returned in ascending order.

API differences are handled via conditional compilation: ForgeTypeId/UnitTypeId on Revit 2021+ and DisplayUnitType on earlier versions.

Methods

Build(ForgeTypeId)

Builds a list of valid accuracy values for the specified unit (Revit 2021+ unit API).

public static IReadOnlyList<double> Build(ForgeTypeId unitId)

Parameters

unitId ForgeTypeId

The unit identifier used to validate and generate candidate accuracies.

Returns

IReadOnlyList<double>

A sorted list of unique accuracy values that are valid for Autodesk.Revit.DB.FormatOptions for the given unit.

Remarks

Uses Autodesk.Revit.DB.FormatOptions.IsValidAccuracy(System.Double) to filter candidates. Fractional candidates are used only for fractional inch units.
